title: PR-1 integrated GameSession exit gates
summary: Run and harden the integrated PR-1 gates for continuous 10-minute runtime, same-session read models, Worker/headless hash parity, 100000-tick leak checks and static-fixture retirement evidence.
acceptance: Normal speed GameSession runs continuously for 10 minutes with Worker-owned scheduling and without UI advance helpers, drain helpers or command-drain loops driving normal time
At least 8 default visible residents, focused resources, alerts and selection details are proven to come from one GameSession basis and matching world/read-model hash lineage
Worker and headless produce matching checkpoint hashes and read-model hashes for a fixed PR-1 seed and command stream
A 100000 tick integrated run reports no job, reservation, queue, path-request or resource conservation leak; first divergence diagnostics include seed, tick, owner store and reason

Default product route does not read WEB_PRODUCT_GATE_READ_MODEL or reviewed-playable-session as gameplay truth; remaining fixture paths are test/diagnostic-only and mechanically checked where feasible
Non-instant work produces observable moving and working projections across multiple publications; no resident work chain completes entirely within one visible frame
Idle, blocked and failed states in the PR-1 path carry structured reason codes and parameters rather than prose-only strings

Schema-v3 GameSession projection negotiation, exact version acceptance, malformed/newer fail-closed behavior and exclusion of legacy regression projections from the default product route are independently verified
The report lists every store reused in PR-1 and every historical M1-M8 capability still not connected to the product runtime
Existing M1-M8 deterministic, save/replay, Worker parity, package-boundary, platform-security and quality gates are either passing or any reviewed exception is explicitly recorded
No PR-2+ implementation, protocol/schema change beyond ADR-0017, save mutation, release action, telemetry/account surface or public save compatibility promise is added

history.details: Scoped as the PR-1 integrated gate task after Worker/Web routing; remains proposed and owned by qa-performance for independent evidence.
Made WM-0165 the sole direct dependency on the serial critical path and added independent schema-v3 projection negotiation/failure-closure evidence; task remains proposed and unclaimed.

saveLoadStance: No public save compatibility is introduced. Gate evidence may test focused internal snapshots only if WM-0163/0164 produced them explicitly and fail-closed.
forbiddenPaths: feature implementation beyond focused gates, tests, diagnostics and reports
lowering PR-1 exit gates to pass a partial implementation
packages/sim-protocol/** changes or any protocol/schema/save format mutation
PR-2+ autonomous-life, command/building expansion, product UX redesign or content-scale implementation
public release, Early Access, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services, public feedback or public save compatibility actions
